user.title: TeamSpeak Server
user.description: How should the integration talk to your TeamSpeak server?

menu_options.webquery: WebQuery HTTP API with API key (recommended)

webquery.title: TeamSpeak WebQuery
webquery.description: WebQuery must be enabled on the server (query_protocols=raw,http). Create an API key with the ServerQuery command: apikeyadd scope=manage lifetime=0 (scope=read is enough for monitoring, but management actions need write/manage).

serverquery.title: TeamSpeak ServerQuery
serverquery.description: Connect to the raw ServerQuery interface of your TeamSpeak server.

error.invalid_sid: This virtual server ID does not exist on the server

poke_client.name: Poke client
poke_client.description: Sends a poke (pop-up alert) to a connected client.

config_entry_id.name: Server
config_entry_id.description: The TeamSpeak server to act on (only needed if you have more than one).

client_id.name: Client ID
client_id.description: The clid of the client (see the 'clients' attribute of the Clients connected sensor).

move_client.name: Move client
move_client.description: Moves a client into another channel.

config_entry_id.name: Server
config_entry_id.description: The TeamSpeak server to act on (only needed if you have more than one).

channel_id.name: Channel ID
channel_id.description: The cid of the target channel (see the 'channels' attribute of the Channels sensor).

kick_client.name: Kick client
kick_client.description: Kicks a client from its channel or from the server.

config_entry_id.name: Server
config_entry_id.description: The TeamSpeak server to act on (only needed if you have more than one).

scope.name: Scope
scope.description: Kick from the current channel or from the whole server.

reason.name: Reason
reason.description: Optional reason shown to the client.

ban_client.name: Ban client
ban_client.description: Bans a client from the server.

config_entry_id.name: Server
config_entry_id.description: The TeamSpeak server to act on (only needed if you have more than one).

duration.name: Duration
duration.description: Ban duration in seconds; 0 means permanent.

send_message.name: Send message to client
send_message.description: Sends a private text message to a connected client.

config_entry_id.name: Server
config_entry_id.description: The TeamSpeak server to act on (only needed if you have more than one).

broadcast_message.name: Broadcast message
broadcast_message.description: Sends a text message to everyone on the virtual server.

config_entry_id.name: Server
config_entry_id.description: The TeamSpeak server to act on (only needed if you have more than one).
